calculator.form_error: Error sending the request. Please try again.
calculator.success_desc: You will receive your quote within 24h. Thank you for trusting ARA FINESTRA!
calculator.social_proof: Over 500 families have already trusted us
calculator.urgency: Installation available in 2-3 weeks. Limited bookings this month.
calculator.faq_q1: What is the average price of a PVC window?
calculator.faq_a1: The price of a standard PVC window ranges between €200 and €500 per unit, depending on dimensions, glass type and finishes. With our calculator you'll get a personalised quote in less than 2 minutes.
calculator.faq_q2: How long does the installation take?
calculator.faq_a2: A standard window installation is completed in 2-3 hours. For a full flat (5-8 windows), the process usually takes 1-2 working days.
calculator.faq_q3: What warranty do Cortizo windows have?
calculator.faq_a3: Cortizo windows have a 10-year factory warranty on profiles and hardware. Additionally, ARA FINESTRA offers 2 extra years of warranty on installation.
calculator.faq_q4: Can I apply for a subsidy to replace windows?
calculator.faq_a4: Yes, PVC windows with high thermal performance can qualify for Next Generation EU grants, with subsidies of up to 40% of the total cost.
calculator.faq_q5: Do I need a building permit to replace windows?
calculator.faq_a5: In most cases no building permit is required if the same dimensions and facade aesthetics are maintained. Our team will advise you on your municipality's regulations.

calculator.urgency_slots: Limited availability — 3 installation slots available this month
calculator.social_proof_count: Over 500 families have already calculated their quote with us

ventana.title: Cortizo PVC Windows
ventana.description: High-efficiency PVC windows with Cortizo profiles. Superior thermal and acoustic insulation for your home.
ventana.benefit_1: Exceptional thermal insulation: reduces heat loss by up to 70%
ventana.benefit_2: Superior acoustic insulation: up to 47 dB noise reduction
ventana.benefit_5: Minimal maintenance: easy cleaning and guaranteed durability
ventana.benefit_6: Wide range of colors and finishes available
ventana.faq_1_q: How long does a PVC window last?
ventana.faq_1_a: Cortizo PVC windows have a useful life of 40-50 years with minimal maintenance.
ventana.faq_2_q: How much can you save on heating?
ventana.faq_2_a: With high-efficiency PVC windows you can save between 25% and 40% on your energy bill.
ventana.faq_3_a: Yes, we offer a wide range of colors and wood-effect finishes that adapt to any style.
ventana.faq_4_a: A standard window installation takes 2-3 hours. A complete apartment usually takes 1-2 days.
ventana.faq_5_a: Shutters are optional. We offer integrated shutters in a compact box for a perfect finish.

puerta.title: PVC Sliding Doors
puerta.description: High-quality sliding doors with Cortizo profiles. Maximum natural light and access to your garden or terrace.
puerta.benefit_1: Maximum natural light entry through large glass panels
puerta.benefit_2: Smooth and silent operation with high-quality bearings
puerta.benefit_3: Thermal and acoustic insulation equivalent to PVC windows
puerta.benefit_6: Adaptable to large dimensions to maximize space
puerta.faq_1_q: What is the maximum width of a sliding door?
puerta.faq_1_a: With the Cortizo system, doors can be made up to 3 meters wide per leaf.
puerta.faq_2_a: Yes, they feature multipoint locks and safety glass. Anti-burglary options available.
puerta.faq_3_q: Can they be made with a flush threshold?
puerta.faq_3_a: Yes, we offer the flush threshold option for barrier-free access, ideal for accessibility.
puerta.faq_4_a: Just clean the tracks periodically and lubricate the bearings once a year.

persiana.title: High-Quality Shutters
persiana.description: Durable and efficient shutters. Sun protection, privacy and security for your home.
persiana.benefit_1: Sun protection: full control of light and temperature
persiana.benefit_2: Additional thermal insulation: air chamber between shutter and window
persiana.benefit_3: Enhanced security with aluminum or extruded PVC slats
persiana.benefit_4: Optional motorization with remote control or home automation
persiana.benefit_5: Compact box integration for a clean finish
persiana.faq_1_q: What types of shutters do you offer?
persiana.faq_1_a: We offer aluminum, PVC and polyurethane-filled aluminum shutters for maximum insulation.
persiana.faq_2_a: Yes, all our shutters can be motorized with Somfy motors with remote control or home automation integration.
persiana.faq_3_q: How much does it cost to motorize a shutter?
persiana.faq_3_a: Motorization has an additional cost starting from 150 euros per unit, depending on dimensions.
persiana.faq_4_q: Is it compatible with current windows?
persiana.faq_4_a: Yes, we can install new shutters on existing windows or as part of a complete renovation.

mosquitera.title: Custom Mosquito Nets
mosquitera.description: Professional quality mosquito nets. Insect protection without losing light or ventilation.
mosquitera.benefit_1: Total insect protection while maintaining natural ventilation
mosquitera.benefit_3: Roller, sliding, fixed or pleated systems
mosquitera.benefit_4: Custom-made for any window or door
mosquitera.benefit_5: Quick and clean installation, no construction work needed
mosquitera.faq_1_q: What types of mosquito nets do you offer?
mosquitera.faq_1_a: We offer roller, sliding, fixed and pleated mosquito nets. Each type is suited for different uses.
mosquitera.faq_2_q: How long does a mosquito net last?
mosquitera.faq_2_a: With normal use, a quality mosquito net lasts between 8 and 12 years.
mosquitera.faq_3_q: Can they be installed on sliding doors?
mosquitera.faq_3_a: Yes, sliding and pleated mosquito nets are ideal for terrace doors and balconies.
mosquitera.faq_4_a: Just clean the mesh with mild soap and water once per season.

cortizo.page_desc: Discover why we work with Cortizo profiles. Spanish quality, sustainability and maximum thermal and acoustic insulation.
cortizo.subtitle: Spain's leader in PVC systems for windows and doors
cortizo.story_p1: Cortizo is a Galician company founded in 1972 that has become Spain's leader in aluminum and PVC systems for architecture. With over 50 years of experience, they manufacture in Spain with the highest quality standards.
cortizo.story_p2: Their commitment to sustainability and innovation has led them to develop PVC profiles with the best thermal and acoustic insulation performance on the market, contributing to building energy efficiency.
cortizo.series_c70: Standard 70mm series with 5 chambers. Excellent value for money for most residential applications.
cortizo.series_a84: Premium 84mm series with 6 chambers and triple seal. Maximum insulation for demanding climate zones.
cortizo.series_e170: Lift-and-slide series for large terrace doors. Up to 3m wide per leaf with smooth operation.
cortizo.certs_desc: All Cortizo profiles have the most demanding European certifications, guaranteeing quality and durability.
cortizo.cta_desc: Calculate your quote with Cortizo profiles and discover how much you can save on energy.
cortizo.comparison_title: Compare materials: PVC vs Aluminium vs Wood

process.page_desc: Discover our PVC window installation process in 5 simple steps. From free consultation to warranty and aftercare.
process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: From first contact to installation in 5 simple steps
process.step1_desc: Contact us by phone, WhatsApp or web form. We advise you with no obligation on the best options for your home.
process.step2_desc: A specialized technician visits your home to take exact measurements and assess the specific needs of your property.
process.step3_desc: You will receive a detailed quote within 24-48 hours with all options and transparent pricing. No surprises.
process.step4_desc: Our team of certified installers fits your new windows with care and cleanliness. Usually completed in 1-2 days.
process.step5_desc: Enjoy the 10-year Cortizo warranty and our aftercare service. We are always at your disposal.

subsidies_page.page_desc: Take advantage of European grants to renovate your windows. We handle all the paperwork.
subsidies_page.subtitle: European grants for the energy renovation of your home
subsidies_page.what_p1: Next Generation grants are European funds aimed at improving the energy efficiency of buildings. They cover up to 40% of the cost of window and enclosure renovation.
subsidies_page.what_p2: These subsidies are part of the European recovery plan and are available for private homes, homeowner associations and public buildings.
subsidies_page.req_2: Demonstrable improvement in energy efficiency (energy certificate)
subsidies_page.req_4: Enclosures with thermal transmittance below established limits
subsidies_page.paperwork_desc: Don't worry about the paperwork. ARA FINESTRA manages the entire subsidy application process for you.
subsidies_page.step_1: Technical visit and detailed quote with the necessary specifications
subsidies_page.step_2: Preparation of all documentation and energy certificates
subsidies_page.step_3: Submission of the application to the relevant authority
subsidies_page.step_4: Follow-up of the file until resolution and payment
subsidies_page.amount_desc: of the total cost of window and enclosure renovation
subsidies_page.cta_title: Want to know if you qualify for subsidies?
subsidies_page.cta_desc: Contact us and we'll inform you without obligation about the subsidies available for your home.
subsidies_page.faq_a1: Next Generation grants are European funds aimed at improving the energy efficiency of buildings. They cover up to 40% of the cost of window and enclosure renovation.
subsidies_page.faq_a2: Homes built before 2007, with demonstrable improvement in energy efficiency, installation by an accredited professional and enclosures with thermal transmittance below established limits.
subsidies_page.faq_q3: How much can I save with subsidies?
subsidies_page.faq_a3: Subsidies cover up to 40% of the total cost of window and enclosure renovation, including materials and installation.
subsidies_page.faq_a4: ARA FINESTRA manages the entire process: technical visit, documentation, application submission and follow-up until resolution and payment.
subsidies_page.faq_q5: How long does the application process take?
subsidies_page.faq_a5: The full process, from technical visit to resolution, usually takes between 2 and 4 months, depending on the managing authority.

warranty.title: Full warranty
warranty.description: 10-year Cortizo factory warranty + 2-year installation warranty. Complete peace of mind.

legal.privacy_content:
DATA CONTROLLER
ARA FINESTRA, based in Girona, Catalunya, Spain. Email: info@arafinestra.com

PURPOSE OF DATA PROCESSING
Personal data collected through our website and contact forms will be processed for the following purposes:
- Managing quote requests and commercial enquiries.
- Sending information about our services, offers and news (only with prior consent).
- Managing the contractual relationship with our clients.

LEGAL BASIS
Data processing is based on:
- The consent of the data subject (contact forms and subscriptions).
- The performance of a contract or pre-contractual measures (quote requests).
- The legitimate interest of the controller (service improvement).

RECIPIENTS
Data will not be shared with third parties except where legally required. Web hosting and email service providers may have access to the data.

DATA RETENTION
Data will be retained for the duration of the business relationship and for the legally established periods. Commercial contact data will be retained until you request its deletion.

DATA SUBJECT RIGHTS
You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction of processing and portability by sending an email to info@arafinestra.com with a copy of your ID.
You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).

SECURITY MEASURES
ARA FINESTRA has adopted the necessary technical and organisational measures to ensure the security of personal data.
legal.terms_content:
IDENTIFICATION
ARA FINESTRA, based in Girona, Catalunya, Spain.
Email: info@arafinestra.com

PURPOSE
These terms govern the use of the website arafinestra.com and the contracting of window, door, shutter and mosquito net installation services.

SERVICES
ARA FINESTRA offers PVC joinery installation services with Cortizo profiles. Online quotes are indicative and do not constitute a binding contractual offer. The final quote will be provided after the technical visit.

PRICES AND PAYMENT
Prices shown in the calculator are indicative estimates. The final price will be confirmed in the detailed quote. Payment conditions will be established in the service contract.

WARRANTIES
Installed products are covered by the manufacturer's warranty (Cortizo). The installation warranty covers assembly defects for 2 years.

LIABILITY
ARA FINESTRA is not responsible for:
- Errors or interruptions of the website.
- Content of linked third-party websites.
- Improper use of installed products.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All website content (texts, images, designs, logos) is the property of ARA FINESTRA or its licensors. Reproduction without authorisation is prohibited.

APPLICABLE LAW
These terms are governed by Spanish law. The courts of Girona shall have jurisdiction over any disputes.
legal.cookies_content:
WHAT ARE COOKIES?
Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device when you visit them. They are used to remember your preferences and improve the browsing experience.

WHAT COOKIES DO WE USE?

Technical cookies (necessary):
- Session cookies: enable navigation through the website. They expire when the browser is closed.
- Language preference cookies: remember the selected language.

Analytical cookies:
- Google Analytics: collect anonymous information about website usage (pages visited, time spent). Purpose: to improve the website.

HOW TO MANAGE COOKIES?
You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Please note that disabling technical cookies may affect the functioning of the website.

- Chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies
- Firefox: Options > Privacy and security
- Safari: Preferences > Privacy
- Edge: Settings > Cookies and site permissions

UPDATES
This cookie policy may be updated at any time. The date of the last update is: March 2026.

MORE INFORMATION
For any questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us at info@arafinestra.com.

financing.page_desc: Finance your PVC windows with comfortable instalments from 3 to 24 months. No deposit, no interest, no surprises. Calculate your payment.
financing.subtitle: Pay in comfortable instalments from 3 to 24 months. No deposit, no interest, no surprises.
financing.calc_subtitle: Select your project amount and see how the payment looks
financing.calc_disclaimer: Indicative amounts. The final payment is calculated on the definitive quote.
financing.step_1: Request a free quote. We visit your home and provide a no-obligation quote.
financing.step_2: Choose your payment plan. Pick between 3, 6, 12 or 24 months interest-free.
financing.step_3: Approval in 24h. Fast response with no complicated paperwork.
financing.step_4: Scheduled installation. We start the work on the date that suits you.
financing.combo_desc: Combine interest-free financing with Next Generation subsidies to get the lowest possible payment.
financing.faq_q1: What are the requirements to apply for financing?
financing.faq_a1: You just need to be of legal age and a resident of Spain. No payslip or guarantor needed. The application is simple with no complicated paperwork.
financing.faq_q2: How long does financing approval take?
financing.faq_a2: Approval is done within 24 hours. Once approved, we schedule the installation at your convenience.
financing.faq_q3: What is the maximum amount that can be financed?
financing.faq_a3: Projects up to 15,000 EUR can be financed. For higher amounts, contact us and we will find the best solution.
financing.faq_q4: Can I cancel or repay early?
financing.faq_a4: Yes, you can cancel or repay early at any time without any penalty or additional costs.
financing.cta_desc: Discover how much your new windows will cost and what your monthly payment will be.

about_page.page_title: About Us - PVC Window Installers in Girona
about_page.page_desc: We are a local company in Girona specializing in Cortizo PVC window installation. Over 500 projects completed with 10-year warranty.
about_page.title: About us
about_page.subtitle: Local Girona company specializing in Cortizo PVC window installations
about_page.story_p1: ARA FINESTRA was born from a passion for quality installations and a commitment to the local community. We are a family business from the Selva region, based in Blanes, that from day one has chosen to work with the best materials on the market. As a certified Cortizo partner, we guarantee that every window installed meets the highest standards of quality and energy efficiency.
about_page.story_p2: We cover the entire Costa Brava and the province of Girona, with a 60 km service radius. We know the climate, local regulations and the needs of each home. This proximity allows us to offer a fast, personalized service with complete follow-up on every project.
about_page.value_quality_desc: We work exclusively with Cortizo profiles, Spain's leading PVC systems brand. Every installation follows the most demanding quality protocols.
about_page.value_proximity_desc: We are a local Girona team. Fast response, visits within 24-48h and deep knowledge of the area.
about_page.value_transparency_desc: Clear, detailed quotes with no hidden costs or surprises. You know exactly what you pay and what you get.
about_page.value_warranty_desc: 10-year Cortizo factory warranty on profiles and hardware, plus 2 years warranty on our installation.
about_page.team_subtitle: Certified professionals at your service. Every member of our team is trained and specialized.
about_page.team_installer_desc: Cortizo-trained. Expert in fitting windows, sliding doors and shutters with impeccable finishes.
about_page.team_advisor_desc: With you from first contact. Home visits, personalized advice and project follow-up.
about_page.team_technician_desc: After-sales and maintenance. Any issue is resolved quickly and professionally.
about_page.cta_desc: Request a free, no-obligation visit. We come to your home, take measurements and offer you a personalized quote.

free_visit.page_title: Free Home Visit - PVC Windows Girona
free_visit.seo_desc: Request a free home visit. A certified technician will visit your home within 48h to take measurements and give you an exact quote with no obligation.
free_visit.hero_sub: A certified technician will visit your home within 48 hours to take measurements and provide an exact quote, with no obligation whatsoever.
free_visit.step1_desc: Name, phone and your town. Less than one minute.
free_visit.step2_desc: We confirm the visit and agree on the day and time that works best for you.
free_visit.step3_desc: The technician takes measurements, assesses needs and delivers an exact quote.
free_visit.form_sub: Fill in the form and we'll contact you within 2 hours.
free_visit.description_placeholder: E.g. Replace 4 living room windows, install shutters...
free_visit.success_detail: We'll contact you within 2 hours to confirm the day and time. Check your phone.
free_visit.testimonial_text: They came to our home within 2 days, took measurements and the quote was clear with no surprises. Highly recommended!
free_visit.coverage_title: We cover the entire province of Girona
free_visit.coverage_sub: Professional Cortizo PVC window service within a 60 km radius from Blanes.
free_visit.coverage_more: Don't see your town? Contact us anyway, we can probably help!
free_visit.faq1_a: No, the visit is 100% free with absolutely no obligation. The technician will come to your home, take measurements and provide a detailed quote at no cost.
free_visit.faq2_q: How long does the visit take?
free_visit.faq2_a: The technical visit takes between 30 and 45 minutes. The technician takes measurements, assesses the current state of windows and advises on the best options.
free_visit.faq3_q: Am I obligated to hire after the visit?
free_visit.faq3_a: No, absolutely no obligation. The visit and quote are free. You decide at your own pace and without any pressure.
free_visit.faq4_q: Is it really free or are there hidden costs?
free_visit.faq4_a: The visit is 100% free with no obligation. A certified technician will come to your home, take exact measurements and give you a detailed quote. If you decide not to proceed, you pay absolutely nothing.
free_visit.faq5_q: How long does the window installation take?
free_visit.faq5_a: A typical installation of 4-6 windows is completed in 1-2 working days. We prepare everything in advance to minimize disruption. Your home will be ready with its new windows sooner than you think.
free_visit.faq6_q: Are PVC windows really better than aluminium?
free_visit.faq6_a: Yes. Cortizo PVC offers thermal insulation up to 3 times better than aluminium, reducing your heating bill by up to 40%. Plus, they require no maintenance, don't corrode, and have a lifespan of over 50 years.
